summary: Marketing Board Testing Complete - All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified working correctly with all major features.
seed_data_creation: Multiple test team members created during testing (test_member_*.test.com emails)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Marketing Board fully tested and working. Created test file /app/backend/tests/test_marketing_board.py with 19 comprehensive tests covering authentication, team stats, leads management, edit, reassignment, and distribution settings.

super_admin_access.details: Super Admin can access Marketing Board at /marketing-board. Non-super-admin users correctly get 403 Forbidden.

team_performance_stats.details: Pre-Sales Team shows: Name, Email, Total Leads, Appt Booked, Conversion Rate. Sales Team shows: Name, Email, Appointments, Deals Closed, Close Rate.

all_leads_tab.details: All Leads displays table with columns: Lead, Contact, Type (Pre-Sales/Sales), Source, Assigned To (dropdown), Stage, Created date, Edit action. Search and filter by Type/Assignee working.

individual_salesperson_view.details: Clicking team member opens dialog showing: Summary stats (Total Leads, Appt Booked, Rate, Filtered Results), Lead Stage Breakdown, Filters (Date From, Date To, Source, Stage), and Leads table with edit actions.
individual_salesperson_view.ui_verified: Screenshot shows Kavitha Nair view with 2 leads, filters, and stage breakdown

lead_edit_functionality.details: PATCH /api/crm/leads/{lead_id} endpoint working. Can edit name, email, phone, city fields.

lead_reassignment.details: POST /api/marketing/assign-lead/{lead_id}?assigned_to={user_id} working. Updates assigned_to and assigned_to_name fields.

distribution_toggle.details: Lead Distribution Engine toggle working. Can enable/disable round-robin distribution. Toast notification shows state change.

add_team_member.details: Add Team Member dialog opens with Name*, Email*, Phone, Role* (Pre-Sales/Sales) fields. POST /api/marketing/team-members creates user and auto-adds to distribution team.

lead_sources_tab.details: Shows Lead Sources Breakdown with percentages: Website (33.3%), Meta (13.3%), CSV Import (13.3%), Walk In (13.3%), Referral (13.3%), SEO (6.7%), Other (6.7%)

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/marketing/dashboard: PASS - Returns pre_sales_team, sales_team stats with totals and leads_by_source
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/marketing/distribution-settings: PASS - Returns team configurations and enabled state
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/marketing/team-members: PASS - Returns pre_sales_team and sales_team arrays
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/marketing/team-members: PASS - Creates new team member (pre_sales or sales)
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/marketing/all-leads: PASS - Returns leads with filters (stage_type, assigned_to)
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/marketing/assign-lead/{lead_id: PASS - Reassigns lead to different team member
api_endpoints_tested.PATCH /api/crm/leads/{lead_id}: PASS - Updates lead fields (name, email, phone, city)

ui_elements_verified.marketing_board_header: PASS - Shows 'Marketing Board' title with Lead Distribution & Team Management subtitle
ui_elements_verified.lead_distribution_engine: PASS - Shows toggle switch with Enabled/Disabled state
ui_elements_verified.stats_cards: PASS - Total Pre-Sales Leads, Total Sales Appointments, Pre-Sales Team count, Sales Team count
ui_elements_verified.tabs: PASS - Overview, Sales Team, All Leads, Lead Sources tabs working
ui_elements_verified.team_member_cards: PASS - Shows avatar, name, email, and stats (Leads, Appt Booked, Rate)
ui_elements_verified.leads_table: PASS - Shows Lead, Contact, Type, Source, Assigned To dropdown, Stage, Created, Actions
ui_elements_verified.individual_view_dialog: PASS - Shows person info, summary stats, stage breakdown, filters, leads table
ui_elements_verified.add_member_dialog: PASS - Form with Name, Email, Phone, Role dropdown
